title: Yellow Balloons, Pack of 100, 10 Inch Latex, Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower, Anniversary, Graduation Decoration
features: Yellow balloons: you will receive 100 x 10 inch latex yellow balloons, balloon set is everything you need to make your party an unforgettable experience.

Premium latex balloons: the yellow balloons are made of natural latex, which is durable and safe, strong and thick, beautiful and not easy to break. Balloons stay intact throughout your event and give your decoration a colourful accent.

Easy to inflate: the yellow latex balloons can be easily inflated with a pump or an inflator and can be filled with air or helium. Do not fill the balloons too full, but only 85-90%, avoid sharp objects and keep the balloons away from high temperatures. You can inflate the balloons to different sizes to create imaginative decorations while enjoying valuable time with your loved ones.

Ideal party decoration: yellow balloons party decoration for birthday decoration, graduations, baby showers, weddings, bachelor parties, anniversaries and more. Let them add colour and fun to any special moment!
